prestazioni: Stage 1: Custom ECU Remap, High-Flow Panel Air Filter (+15-20% HP)
Stage 2: Upgraded Downpipe, Full Decat Exhaust System, Larger Intercooler (+30-35% HP)
Stage 3: Individual Throttle Bodies (ITBs) or Supercharger Bolt-on Kit, Forged Pistons (+45%+ HP)
estetica: Aggressive Carbon Fiber Front Splitter & Rear Diffuser
Lightweight Forged Performance Wheels with Sticky Compound Tires
